title: Vandor-3

*[[Toozler's Speeder Repair and Maintenance]] *A [[Unidentified Vandor-3 spaceport|spaceport]] |flora= |fauna=[[Selenome]]''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' |otherlife= |species=[[Human/Legends|Humans]] |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language=[[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]] |government= |population= |demonym= |cities=*[[Vangard]] {{C|[[Capital/Legends|capital]]}} *[[Ackbar City]] |imports= |exports=*[[Foodstuff/Legends|Food]] *[[Plastic/Legends|Plastic]] |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] *[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] *[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] }} {{Quote|Thaal was an army colonel stationed here on Coruscant when the Yuuzhan Vong invasion came. Instead of evacuating, he volunteered to lead a unit of elites to set up on Vandor-Three.''"
"''Where?''"
"''It's actually here in the Coruscant system. The next planet sunward.|[[Myri Antilles]] and [[Viull Gorsat]]|}} '''Vandor-3''', also spelled as '''Vandor-Three''', was the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]]. ==Description== {{Quote|Lightly populated by Coruscant standards. It has old links to the armed forces—back in the Clone Wars, there were clone trooper training grounds near Vangard, the capital. But now it's mostly agricultural, with a petroleum industry. It supplies Coruscant with a lot of its food and raw material for plastic products. Most people here consider Vandor-Three to be beyond the borders of civilization and culture. Like an uneducated cousin who doesn't bathe.|[[Myri Antilles]], to [[Viull Gorsat]]|}} Vandor-3 was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]] with [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] and a small population. Its [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] was a small industrial town that included a [[petroleum]] plant. ==History== ===Early history=== {{Quote|I've never been to Coruscant. Closest I ever came was training on one of the inner worlds of that system. You've been there?''"
"''Once. Before the start of the Outer Rim Sieges.|[[Climber (clone)|Climber]] and [[Salvo (clone trooper)|Salvo]]|''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]''}} In [[43 BBY/Legends|43 BBY]], the [[Tech Raiders]], a criminal organization that stole tech equipment and later sold them on the [[Black market/Legends|black market]], relocated their base to Vandor-3.''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Deadly Hunter]]'' Vandor-3 served as a training ground for [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. For the training ground, a [[Barracks/Legends|barracks]] was constructed on the capital's outskirts that could hold 50,000 [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]]. One particular exercise involved facing the [[selenome]] that inhabited one of the planet's oceans. ===Later history=== {{Quote|When the final assault came here on Coruscant, he somehow persuaded his superiors to let him go to Vandor-Three and build a resistance cell there. Which he did pretty well. Those were his original Pop-Dogs, and he became a hero.|[[Zehrinne Thaal]], to [[Garik Loran]]|}} Following the [[Declaration of a New Order]], Vandor-3 became part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. At some point after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Vandor-3 joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and later its successor state, the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Deadly Hunter]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Death of Hope]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' *[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]] *''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' {{Ab|Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Imo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}} *[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} *''[[X-Wing: Mercy Kill]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Mercy Kill (audiobook)}} ==Sources== *''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030403coruscant|text=Coruscant: Center of the Empire|int=Coruscant: Center of the Empire}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Vandor-3 |es=Vandor-3 |it=Vandor-3 |pl=Vandor-3 |pt=Vandor-3 }} [[Category:Coruscant system locations]] [[Category:Galactic Alliance planets]] [[Category:Galactic Empire planets]] [[Category:Galactic Republic planets]] [[Category:New Republic planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Core Worlds]] [[Category:Waterworlds]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Vandor-3 locations]] }}
